title: agent:ready payload
description: Optional readiness acknowledgement emitted by the agent after agent:capabilities negotiation when protocolReadyAck is negotiated.

agent_id.description: Canonical agent identifier for the connected agent.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the agent emitted readiness.

protocol.description: Negotiated logical protocol in use for the session (for example, 'jsonrpc-v2').
